{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315343533126C0AA731C0CBCD0F"}"},"total":592},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618936825694405400","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看好看。绝对是我看过最好看的穿越抗战文了。一口气追平了。没有感情戏真的好评，loan一点点暧昧擦边球那种都没有。主角做事果断，有系统，但是主角自己的能力也不容忽视。这种好书一定要涨分啊，绝对值9.5以上"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773925726,"group_id":"7597010023822150681","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"加油吧，每天都努力一点","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzcXqwwV2M4tC6Ju8iOwrdMfJYn26e8QLP2+DTDH9k/c","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4160966868343495","user_name":"蜜桃腐乳酱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4160966868343495","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7597010023822150681","book_info":{"abstract":"【民国】+【系统只是辅助】+【不后宫无CP】+【外科医生】
